title: Claude Fable 5 is here!
summary: AI Search reviews Claude Fable 5 (also called Mythos 5), demonstrating capabilities including ray tracing, 3D reconstruction, music composition, and chemistry tasks. The video benchmarks Fable 5 against GPT 5.5 and discusses model specifications and performance trade-offs.
writeup: AI Search reviews Claude Fable 5 (also called Claude Mythos 5) and benchmarks it against GPT 5.5. The demonstration spans image understanding, 3D reconstruction, music composition, chemistry, and cancer classification, alongside discussion of benchmarks and specifications. The focus is multimodal capability across diverse tasks rather than a single domain.
